title: 心に芽吹く、君という物語

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the Arima Kinen, we visit Kyoto Racecourse
at Rice Shower's request.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Sorry to make you come all the way to Kyoto
when there isn't even a race, Big Brother.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Sorry to make you come all the way to Kyoto
when there isn't even a race, Big Sister.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to burn this image into my mind. This
turf I've raced on so much.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: It's packed full of precious memories.
choice_data_list:
Now that I think about it, this place was
important to you even before you debuted,
huh?

Now that I think about it, this place was
important to you even before you debuted,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... yeah. Bakushin O and I came here to
watch the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I saw McQueen here. She was just like the blue
rose, and I wanted to be like that too. I admired
her so much...
choice_data_list: And now you're a blue rose too.
And now you're a blue rose too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, Mihono Bourbon declared them to be rivals
here after the Kikuka Sho as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And even with the previous spring Tenno Sho
winner in front of her, she didn't waver. She
bloomed beautifully.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And then, there was the Takarazuka Kinen, which
had everyone in despair at first. But she was able
to share her dream with everyone there.
choice_data_list:
Your story will be told for generations—just like
the fairytales in a book.

Your story will be told for generations—just like
the fairytales in a book.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
What?! Y-you're making too big a deal of me, Big
Brother!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
What?! Y-you're making too big a deal of me, Big
Sister!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Really, Big Brother...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Really, Big Sister...

text_block_list.name: Child
text_block_list.text: Hurry up, Mommy! I wanna go on the slide first!

text_block_list.name: Mother
text_block_list.text:
Be careful! You'll fall down if you rush. And be
sure to take turns with your friends.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...The slide?
choice_data_list: I think there's a park inside the racecourse.
I think there's a park inside the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Really?! So that's why there are little kids here—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: U-um! Big Brother? I think it's time we head home.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: U-um! Big Sister? I think it's time we head home.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Well, what if starts raining because I'm here and
the kids can't play anymore?
choice_data_list: Nothing like that is going to happen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I checked the weather yesterday and this
morning. Both times, it said there was a zero
percent chance of rain today. Besides, Rice
Shower doesn't bring mis—

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Let's play Rice Shower once we get to the park! I
get to be Rice!

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text:
No fair! I wanna be Rice Shower! I get to be her
next!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Play... "Rice Shower"?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've actually heard about this. Recently, children
that like Rice Shower have been playing games,
pretending to be her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That said, I never thought I'd see it in person.

text_block_list.name: Boy C
text_block_list.text: Hey, are you the real Rice Shower?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: U-um, yes. That's me...

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Really? You're the really real Rice?! Oh my gosh!
Can I shake your hand?

text_block_list.name: Boy C
text_block_list.text:
Hey, when are you gonna race next? You're
gonna come back to Kyoto, right?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, I... uhhh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A crowd of rowdy children gather around Rice
Shower.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure this cycle of admiration will continue. Just
like how Rice Shower first admired Mejiro
McQueen, these children now admire Rice
Shower.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-Big Brother?! Wh-wh-what should I do?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-Big Sister?! Wh-wh-what should I do?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not used to the attention of little kids, Rice
Shower's brow furrows in confusion. I try to help
her out.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Okay, I see. So you just want me to win
another race here?

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'll be cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'll do my best to do that for you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower reaches out her hand and pats the
girl's head gently.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Even if my story isn't passed down for
generations...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Even if my story isn't passed down for
generations...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It seems like there will still be kids who remember
me. I'm so, so lucky!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Judging by the smile on her face, the admiration
of those children has made Rice Shower very
happy.

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text:
Of course! You can't talk about Kyoto racing
without mentioning Rice Shower!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry... What?!
choice_data_list: Do you all love Rice Shower?

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: You bet! I wanna be just like her one day!

text_block_list.name: Boy C
text_block_list.text:
Me too! She's so cool, and she runs so fast. I
wanna see her run here again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eyes shining, the children gather around Rice
Shower, waiting for what the racer they admire so
much has to say next.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, right...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm definitely going to come back here. I promise.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'll run my heart out for you... and be the first
across the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Really?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Really! ...Hehe. Hey, Big Brother...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Really! ...Hehe. Hey, Big Sister...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Looks like I've made another precious memory
here, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From now on—and forever ever after—there will
be children that watch her run and pin their hopes
and dreams on her.
